sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Concurrent Investment Advisors LLC Increases Stock Position in Energy Transfer LP $ET
feed.summary: Concurrent Investment Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Energy Transfer LP by 53.8% in Q4, acquiring an additional 116,531 shares to bring its total holdings to 333,306 shares valued at $5.496 million. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for ET with a consensus price target of $21.60. Despite a recent EPS miss, the company reported nearly 30% revenue growth year-over-year and offers an attractive annualized dividend yield of 7.0%.

feed.title: Bernstein downgrades Campbell’s stock rating on soup, snack woes By Investing.com
feed.summary: Bernstein SocGen Group downgraded Campbell's Co. (CPB) to Market Perform from Outperform, lowering its price target to $21.00 from $27.00 due to underperformance in its soup and snacks divisions. The stock is trading near its 52-week low, reflecting challenges like declining revenue and market share losses for brands such as Cape Cod, Kettle, and Snyder’s pretzels. Despite these issues, the company maintains a 7.4% dividend yield and has paid dividends for 56 consecutive years.

feed.title: Ex-Jefferies EMEA equities head joins FTI Consulting in London
feed.summary: FTI Consulting announced the appointment of Mike Davies as Senior Managing Director in its Strategic Communications segment in London. Mr. Davies brings over 25 years of EMEA investment banking experience, previously serving as Jefferies' Head of Sales, EMEA Equities. He will focus on equity story development, investor engagement, and transaction communications, enhancing FTI Consulting's capital markets capabilities.

feed.title: Absa uses WhatsApp to verify suspected fraud, lifts containment 33%
feed.summary: Absa Group Limited, a major South African bank, has significantly enhanced its fraud prevention and debt collection strategies by integrating FICO's Customer Communication Services with WhatsApp. This innovation has led to a 33% increase in digital fraud containment and a 29% increase in card fraud containment, along with improved collections outcomes. Absa was recognized with a 2026 FICO® Decision Award for these achievements, demonstrating the power of intelligent omnichannel communications in banking.

feed.title: Anchyra Partners LLC Acquires Shares of 17,324 Delta Air Lines, Inc. $DAL
feed.summary: Anchyra Partners LLC has acquired a new stake of 17,324 shares in Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) for approximately $1.20 million in the fourth quarter. This comes as Delta's board declared a quarterly cash dividend, signaling confidence in its financial health, even though insider sales totaled over $25 million in the last quarter. Analysts have issued varied price targets and ratings, with an overall "Moderate Buy" consensus despite challenges like rising fuel costs and supply disruptions.

feed.title: Anchyra Partners LLC Takes Position in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Anchyra Partners LLC has initiated a new position in GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) during Q4, acquiring 1,776 shares valued at approximately $1.161 million. This comes after GE Vernova reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS estimates, exceeding revenue expectations, and raising free cash flow guidance, driven by data-center electrification and a record backlog. Despite these positive indicators and multiple analyst upgrades, the stock faces risks from insider selling, headwinds in its Wind segment, valuation concerns after a significant price rally, and potential near-term downside.

feed.title: Anchyra Partners LLC Makes New Investment in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Anchyra Partners LLC has made a new investment in Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO), purchasing 26,829 shares in Q4, making it their 27th largest holding. The article highlights positive sentiment around Cisco due to the unveiling of a Universal Quantum Switch prototype, suggesting potential long-term revenue opportunities in the AI-quantum convergence. Analyst ratings are generally positive, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $89.81, and the company recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Fidelity National (FIS) Launches Clearing Infrastructure for a Market Wall Street Hasn’t Caught Up To Yet
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) has launched FIS CD Prediction Clearing, a new post-trade clearing solution for regulated prediction markets. This cloud-native platform addresses the need for faster, higher-volume, and 24/7 trading capabilities in these markets, which were previously underserved by legacy systems. The solution is integrated into FIS's existing Cleared Derivatives suite, offering an upgrade to current clients and enabling futures commission merchants (FCMs) to handle millions of transactions daily with real-time risk updates.

feed.title: Blackstone Strikes Optimistic Private Markets Tone With Q1 Results
feed.summary: Blackstone reported strong Q1 2026 results, with net attributable income rising to $649.7 million and total revenues increasing to $3.62 billion. The firm's private wealth assets under management grew by 14% year-over-year to $310 billion, and it saw significant inflows in its private credit and insurance segment despite a turbulent environment and heavy redemptions in the broader private credit sector.

feed.title: Mizuho Initiates on Fair Isaac (FICO) With an Outperform; Says the Market Has Overreacted
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Sean Kennedy initiated coverage on Fair Isaac (FICO) with an Outperform rating and a $1,416 price target, asserting that the market has overreacted to competitive concerns. Kennedy believes Fair Isaac's market dominance is deeply entrenched due to regulatory requirements, historical trust, and its direct sales model to mortgage lenders. He also suggests FICO is a rate-sensitive stock, poised to benefit from potential falls in interest rates due to increased mortgage refinancing activity.

feed.title: Warehouses That Pay: 4 REITs Riding the E-Commerce Wave
feed.summary: The e-commerce boom and just-in-time supply chains are driving sustained demand for industrial real estate. This article highlights four U.S.-listed REITs—Prologis, Public Storage, CubeSmart, and EastGroup Properties—that offer market values above $9 billion, dividend yields over 3%, and positive year-to-date returns. These REITs represent diverse segments of the industrial and self-storage markets, catering to logistics, consumer storage, and regional distribution needs.

feed.title: B. Metzler seel. Sohn & Co. AG Has $857,000 Stock Holdings in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. $ARE
feed.summary: B. Metzler seel. Sohn & Co. AG significantly reduced its stake in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, selling 69.2% of its shares, though institutional investors still hold a large portion of the stock. Alexandria Real Estate Equities reported mixed Q4 results with an EPS beat but a decline in revenue and negative margins, while paying a quarterly dividend with a 6.1% yield. Despite inconsistent company performance and a "Hold" consensus from analysts, Chairman Joel Marcus increased his personal holdings in the company.

feed.title: B. Metzler seel. Sohn & Co. AG Takes $1.15 Million Position in L3Harris Technologies Inc $LHX
feed.summary: B. Metzler seel. Sohn & Co. AG recently acquired a new stake of 3,904 shares, valued at approximately $1.15 million, in L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) during the fourth quarter. This comes as L3Harris secured a $1 billion strategic investment from the Department of War for its Missile Solutions business, strengthening its backlog and cash support for growth. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.25 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $5.00 and a yield of approximately 1.6%.

feed.title: Capital Investment Advisory Services LLC Grows Stake in Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Capital Investment Advisory Services LLC increased its stake in Apple Inc. by 1.8% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 151,373 shares valued at over $41 million. Apple reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.84 EPS and $143.76 billion in revenue. Despite institutional buying, CEO Tim Cook sold a significant number of shares, and Berkshire Hathaway also reduced its stake in the company.

feed.title: Cliftonlarsonallen Wealth Advisors LLC Purchases 9,435 Shares of Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Cliftonlarsonallen Wealth Advisors LLC increased its stake in Apple Inc. by 5.6% during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 9,435 shares to bring its total holdings to 177,430 shares valued at $48.24 million. This makes Apple the firm's 28th largest position, accounting for approximately 0.7% of its portfolio. While institutional investors have been growing their positions, company insiders, including SVP Deirdre O'Brien and CEO Tim Cook, recently sold a significant number of shares under Rule 10b5-1 plans, reducing insider ownership to about 0.06%.

feed.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL is Center For Asset Management LLC's 10th Largest Position
feed.summary: Center For Asset Management LLC reduced its stake in Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) by 22.5% in Q4, making it their 10th largest holding worth $4.31 million. Additionally, senior insiders Deirdre O'Brien and Tim Cook sold significant portions of their shares on April 2nd. Despite these sales, Apple's recent quarter beat analyst estimates, and the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, though tempered by Berkshire Hathaway's stake reduction and regulatory concerns.

feed.title: B. Metzler seel. Sohn & Co. AG Decreases Position in Gartner, Inc. $IT
feed.summary: B. Metzler seel. Sohn & Co. AG significantly reduced its stake in Gartner, Inc. by 92.9% in Q4 2025, selling 44,906 shares. Despite this, other institutions like Moran Wealth Management and Allianz Asset Management increased their holdings, with institutional ownership remaining high at 91.51%. Gartner faces mixed catalysts, including an increased 2026 global IT spending forecast, but also securities lawsuits and analyst price-target cuts, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating amid elevated headline risk.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL Shares Purchased by Baillie Gifford & Co.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL is Ervin Investment Management LLC's 6th Largest Position

feed.title: Elbit Systems to Release Q1 2026 Financial Results on May 26
feed.summary: Elbit Systems is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 financial results on May 26, 2026, followed by a conference call at 9:00 AM Eastern Time to discuss the results and answer investor questions. The defense technology company reported revenues of $7.938 billion in 2025 and currently holds an order backlog of $28.1 billion, indicating strong market demand and growth potential. Analysts have mixed views on the stock, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus but some maintaining "Hold" or "Neutral" ratings while raising price targets.

feed.title: Financial Institutions Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Financial Institutions (NASDAQ: FISI) reported net income of $20.6 million, or $1.04 per diluted share, for Q1 2026, alongside a 3.2% increase in its quarterly dividend. The company completed a sub-debt refinancing and repurchased shares, while its net interest margin expanded to 367 basis points. Management expressed confidence in achieving a 5% full-year loan growth target, driven by commercial demand in New York markets, and updated full-year guidance for NIM and efficiency ratio.

feed.title: Anchyra Partners LLC Purchases Shares of 16,106 Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER

feed.title: Atomera Expands Synopsys Partnership to Advance GaN Device Modeling
feed.summary: Atomera Inc. has expanded its partnership with Synopsys Inc. to advance gallium nitride (GaN) device modeling for radio frequency (RF) and power semiconductor applications. This collaboration will leverage Synopsys’ Sentaurus TCAD tools to develop calibrated modeling methodologies and simulation decks for GaN devices, aiming to accelerate innovation in power-efficient semiconductor solutions. The initiative builds on their previous work integrating Atomera's MSTcad technology and seeks to enhance understanding of advanced materials for improved device efficiency and faster development cycles.

feed.title: 5 Most Undervalued Defense Stocks to Buy According to Analysts
feed.summary: This article identifies five most undervalued defense stocks based on analyst recommendations, with a focus on Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (HII). HII is highlighted for its strategic initiatives in AI-enabled naval capabilities and expansion of unmanned vessel production, aiming to strengthen its position in next-generation defense systems. The company's collaboration with Applied Intuition and its role as a leading U.S. naval shipbuilder are presented as key factors for its long-term potential.

feed.summary: Anchyra Partners LLC has invested $1.07 million in Waste Management, Inc. by acquiring 4,850 shares in the fourth quarter. Waste Management has increased its quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $255.19.

feed.title: 6,020 Shares in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. $CDNS Purchased by Anchyra Partners LLC
feed.summary: Anchyra Partners LLC has initiated a new stake in Cadence Design Systems, purchasing 6,020 shares valued at approximately $1.88 million during Q4, contributing to institutional investors owning 84.85% of the stock. Insider selling, including a significant transaction by CFO John M. Wall, accounted for 24,680 shares worth $7.58 million in the past 90 days, bringing insider ownership down to 0.49%.

feed.title: Enphase Energy, Inc. Announces Integration Of IQ Batteries With Evergen VPP Platform To Expand Grid Services And Energy Optimisation For Australian Homeowners
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has integrated its IQ Batteries with Evergen's virtual power plant (VPP) platform in Australia and New Zealand. This collaboration aims to provide homeowners with enhanced energy management, allowing them to optimize battery usage, participate in VPP programs, and access financial incentives. The initiative seeks to accelerate battery adoption and contribute to a more stable and resilient electricity grid in Australia.

feed.title: Michael Burry Goes Long Microsoft (MSFT) and MSCI as He Bets Software Selloff Has Created Value, Remains Bearish on PLTR
feed.summary: Michael Burry, known for "The Big Short," has revealed new long positions in Microsoft (MSFT) and MSCI, contending that a selloff in software and payment stocks due to AI-related anxieties has created significant value. He views these positions, along with increased holdings in PayPal and Adobe, as a contrarian play on established, cash-generating tech companies trading at discounts. Concurrently, Burry purchased put options on the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF, NVIDIA (NVDA), and the iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX), expressing a continued bearish stance on AI infrastructure spending while favoring software beneficiaries.

feed.title: Leonardo shares rise following Moody’s rating upgrade
feed.summary: Shares of the Italian aerospace and defense company Leonardo climbed over 1% following an upgrade to its credit rating by Moody's. Moody's elevated Leonardo's rating to 'Baa2' from 'Baa3', while maintaining a positive outlook. This decision reflects an improved assessment of the company's financial position.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Cuts Southern Copper (SCCO) Price Target Amid Copper Rally
feed.summary: Wells Fargo recently lowered its price target for Southern Copper (SCCO) from $192 to $186, maintaining an Equal Weight rating due to adjustments in sector estimates based on elevated copper price forecasts. Separately, Scotiabank raised its price target for SCCO to $133 from $125 but kept an Underperform rating, citing a cautious outlook despite increasing its price-to-NAV multiple for the company's Mexican open-pit assets. Southern Copper, founded in 1952, is a major integrated copper producer but is not yet part of the S&P 500 index.

feed.title: Elbit Systems to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 26, 2026
feed.summary: Elbit Systems Ltd. announced it will publish its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 26, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 9:00 AM Eastern Time to discuss the results, with management available to answer questions. Dial-in details for the call and instructions for accessing an online replay are provided.
